summary: NHS-Level Compliance Hardening (Change Sets 1-2) testing completed. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - scoped endpoints correctly separate applicants from employees, dashboard shows employee-only counts, 3-tier readiness working correctly.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test IDs: Employee d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77 (onboarding), Applicant 8f351317-8623-4df5-8788-c6a3ce5364cf (new)
context_for_next_testing_agent: NHS-Level Compliance Hardening Change Sets 1-2 fully implemented and tested. Key features verified: (1) GET /staff/employees returns only employee-status records (onboarding, active, inactive), (2) GET /recruitment/applicants returns only applicant-status records (new, screening, interview, compliance_review), (3) GET /staff/employees/{id} returns 404 for applicant IDs, (4) GET /recruitment/applicants/{id} returns 404 for employee IDs, (5) GET /employees/{id}/readiness returns authoritative readiness with stable reason codes, (6) Dashboard shows 'Total Employees: 2' (excludes 9 applicants), (7) Workforce Readiness section shows correct 3-tier counts (Ready: 0, Supervised: 0, Not Ready: 2), (8) Employees page shows 2 staff members with 'Staff' badge, (9) Recruitment page shows 9 applicants with 'Applicant' badge, (10) Employee profile shows work readiness status with reason codes like 'Recruitment not approved'.

scoped_list_endpoints.details: GET /staff/employees returns only employee-status records, GET /recruitment/applicants returns only applicant-status records

scoped_profile_endpoints.details: GET /staff/employees/{id} returns 404 for applicant IDs, GET /recruitment/applicants/{id} returns 404 for employee IDs

authoritative_readiness_endpoint.details: GET /employees/{id}/readiness returns status, label, blockedReasons with stable codes, checks object, calculatedAt, source_of_truth

workforce_readiness_3tier.details: Workforce Readiness section shows Ready to Work: 0, Supervised Start: 0, Not Ready: 2

scope_helpers.details: is_applicant_status and is_employee_status work correctly via API behavior

employees_page_ui.details: Shows 2 staff members with 'Staff' badge, 'Recruited' label, work status reasons

recruitment_page_ui.details: Shows 9 applicants with 'Applicant' badge, pipeline stages (New: 9, Screening: 0, Interview: 0, Compliance Review: 0)

employee_profile_readiness.details: Profile shows 'Not Ready to Work' with reasons: 'Recruitment not approved', 'Proof of address (0/2 required)'
